[https://xtools.wmcloud.org/ec?user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}&project=en.wikipedia count] '''·''' [https://www.dnsstuff.com/tools/whois.ch?domain={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}}&cache=off&email=on WHOIS] '''·''' [https://ipinfo.io/{{{1}}} ip details] '''·''' [https://www.dnsstuff.com/tools/tracert.ch?ip={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}} trace] '''·''' [https://www.robtex.com/ip-lookup/{{{1}}}#dnsbl RBLs] • [{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} logs] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] '''·''' arbitration/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for arbitration/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|arb]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for arbitration#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|arb]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for comment/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for comment/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|rfc]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for comment/User conduct|rfc]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: {{SITENAME}}:Long term abuse/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[{{SITENAME}}:Long term abuse/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|lta]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Long term abuse#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|lta]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: investigations#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|spi]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: {{SITENAME}}:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|checkuser]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for checkuser#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|checkuser]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Suspected sock revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{IPcheck|127.0.0.1}}[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|talk]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:User:{{{1}}}|action=edit&preload=Template:IPcheck/Preload}} tag] '''·''' [[Special:Contributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|contribs]] '''·''' [https://xtools.wmcloud.org/ec?user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}&project=en.wikipedia count] '''·''' [https://www.dnsstuff.com/tools/whois.ch?domain={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}}&cache=off&email=on WHOIS] '''·''' [https://ipinfo.io/{{{1}}} ip details] '''·''' [https://www.dnsstuff.com/tools/tracert.ch?ip={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}} trace] '''·''' [https://www.robtex.com/ip-lookup/{{{1}}}#dnsbl RBLs] • [{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} logs] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{anchorencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] '''·''' {{#if:{{{ban|}}}| [[{{SITENAME}}:List of banned users#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|ban]] '''·'''}} {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for arbitration/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for arbitration/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|arb]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for arbitration#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|arb]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for comment/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for comment/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|rfc]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for comment/User conduct|rfc]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: {{SITENAME}}:Long term abuse/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[{{SITENAME}}:Long term abuse/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|lta]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Long term abuse#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|lta]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: investigations#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|spi]]}} '''·''' {{#ifexist: {{SITENAME}}:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for
